_meta.name: HEVC SEP Detector - H.264/MPEG→HEVC Terminology Bridge
_meta.description: 從 ITU-T H.265 規格書 232 個章節萃取的術語橋接規則，僅涵蓋被納入 HEVC 的技術
_meta.usage: 載入到 SEP Detector 後自動擴展 SYNONYM_MAP
_meta.format: synonym_map_entries 可直接注入 SYNONYM_MAP array

A_inter_prediction_core.name: 幀間預測核心 - Direct/Skip/Merge
synonym_map_entries: merge mode skip mode temporal motion vector prediction TMVP
merge mode skip mode cu_skip_flag merge_flag inter prediction
skip mode merge mode no motion vector transmitted
advanced motion vector prediction AMVP merge mode
merge candidate list temporal AMVP motion vector derivation
skip mode CU cu_skip_flag merge candidate no residual
cu_skip_flag skip mode merge_flag equal 1 rqt_root_cbf zero
inter-predicted frame B slice P slice inter prediction
inter-predicted frame B slice P slice
P slice inter prediction list0 reference
B slice bi-prediction list0 list1 reference
bi-directional predicted frame B slice inter_pred_idc PRED_BI

hevc_definitions.merge_flag: specifies whether inter prediction parameters are inferred from neighbouring inter-predicted partition
hevc_definitions.cu_skip_flag: specifies for current CU when decoding P or B slice no more syntax elements except merge_idx
hevc_definitions.inter_pred_idc: specifies whether list0 list1 or bi-prediction is used PRED_L0 PRED_L1 PRED_BI

hevc_definitions.mvp_l0_flag: specifies motion vector predictor index of list0
hevc_definitions.merge_idx: specifies merging candidate index of the merging candidate list
hevc_definitions.ref_idx_l0: specifies list0 reference picture index for current prediction unit

hevc_definitions.pred_mode_flag: the current coding unit is coded in inter prediction mode.
